heading: Acquisition of property; authority of Secretary; State property
label: 273a Acquisition of property; authority of Secretary; State property
text: The Secretary is authorized to acquire by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, transfer from any Federal agency, exchange, or otherwise, the lands and interests in lands described in , except that lands or interests therein owned by the State of Utah, or any political subdivision thereof, may be acquired only with the approval of such State or political subdivision.section 273 of this title
